# Alert

Surfaces an inline, persistent status message.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/alert
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="alert"
  example={0}
  code={`<Alert.Root tone="info">
  <Alert.Icon><Info /></Alert.Icon>
  <Alert.Body>
    <Alert.Title>Heads up</Alert.Title>
    <Alert.Description>You can add components using the CLI.</Alert.Description>
  </Alert.Body>
</Alert.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Alert.Root tone="info">
  <Alert.Icon>
    <Info />
  </Alert.Icon>
  <Alert.Body>
    <Alert.Title>Heads up</Alert.Title>
    <Alert.Description>You can add components using the CLI.</Alert.Description>
  </Alert.Body>
</Alert.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="alert"
  example={1}
  code={`<Alert.Root tone="warning">
  <Alert.Icon><AlertTriangle /></Alert.Icon>
  <Alert.Body>
    <Alert.Title>Storage almost full</Alert.Title>
    <Alert.Description>You're using 92% of your storage.</Alert.Description>
  </Alert.Body>
  <Alert.Close aria-label="Dismiss"><X /></Alert.Close>
</Alert.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Alert.Root tone="warning">
  <Alert.Icon>
    <AlertTriangle />
  </Alert.Icon>
  <Alert.Body>
    <Alert.Title>Storage almost full</Alert.Title>
    <Alert.Description>You're using 92% of your storage.</Alert.Description>
  </Alert.Body>
  <Alert.Close aria-label="Dismiss">
    <X />
  </Alert.Close>
</Alert.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="alert"
  example={2}
  code={`<Alert.Root tone="danger">
  <Alert.Icon><AlertCircle /></Alert.Icon>
  <Alert.Body>
    <Alert.Title>Deployment failed</Alert.Title>
    <Alert.Description>Build #424 exited with code 1.</Alert.Description>
    <Alert.Actions>
      <Button size="sm" tone="danger">Retry</Button>
    </Alert.Actions>
  </Alert.Body>
</Alert.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Alert.Root tone="danger">
  <Alert.Icon>
    <AlertCircle />
  </Alert.Icon>
  <Alert.Body>
    <Alert.Title>Deployment failed</Alert.Title>
    <Alert.Description>Build #424 exited with code 1.</Alert.Description>
    <Alert.Actions>
      <Button size="sm" tone="danger">
        Retry
      </Button>
    </Alert.Actions>
  </Alert.Body>
</Alert.Root>
```

## Props

| Prop      | Type           | Required | Default | Description                                               |
| --------- | -------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `size`    | `AlertSize`    | No       | -       | -                                                         |
| `tone`    | `AlertTone`    | No       | -       | Selects the semantic color palette. Defaults to \`info\`. |
| `variant` | `AlertVariant` | No       | -       | -                                                         |

## Variants

| Variant   | Values                       |
| --------- | ---------------------------- |
| `size`    | `sm`, `md`, `lg`             |
| `variant` | `subtle`, `solid`, `outline` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/alert.json`
- Recipe: `alert`
- Files: `src/components/ui/alert.tsx`
